title: Reentrancy in Vault.withdraw()
description: The withdraw() function sends ETH to msg.sender via a low-level call before zeroing the caller's balance. A malicious contract can re-enter withdraw() in its receive() fallback, draining the vault.
impact: Complete drainage of the contract's ETH balance by a single attacker.
recommendation: Apply the Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern: set balances[msg.sender] = 0 before the external call, or use a ReentrancyGuard modifier.
